reviews.reviewComments: Recommended hotel. Strategic location close to the city, friendly staff. The rooms are spacious, clean, and fragrant.

reviews.reviewTitle: Room Quite Satisfying, Facilities Need Some Care
reviews.reviewPositives: Good location, right at the side of the major road, next to the hotel is fast food KFC, spacious room, strong shower, good wifi, basement parking available, decent breakfast, the omelet and sunny side-up thumbs up, also friendly and responsive staff members ....
reviews.reviewNegatives: The mirror position may need some adjustment, standing in front of it, the head is gone, also the fitness equipment has been obsolete and need replacement

reviews.reviewTitle: Staycation at Hotel Grand Bayu Hill Takengon
reviews.originalTitle: Staycation di Hotel Grand Bayu Hill Takengon
reviews.originalComment:
Hotel Grand Bayu Hill Takengon adalah salah satu hotel terbaik di Aceh Tengah.
Letaknya sangat strategis dipinggir jalan utama, dekat ke Danau Laut Tawar dan juga tempat ibadah.
Stafnya ramah, dan juga kondisinya bersih, dengan harga yang affordable
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel Grand Bayu Hill Takengon is one of the best hotels in Central Aceh. It is strategically located on the main road, close to Lake Laut Tawar and also places of worship. The staff are friendly, the conditions are clean, and the prices are affordable.

reviews.originalComment: Pelayanan ramah,  sarapan pagi banyak pilihan, fasilitas  kolam renang yang aman untuk anak anak
reviews.reviewComments: Friendly service, breakfast with many options, safe swimming pool facilities for children.

reviews.reviewPositives: Mi è piaciuta la organizzazione della colazione, abbiamo gradito che c'era anche un poco di scelta al solito menù indonesiano. Il personale è stato cortese e disponibile. Il ragazzo della reception è stato di grande aiuto. Il letto era abbastanza pulito e comodo.
reviews.reviewNegatives: La camera non era pulita. Non hanno la base di quello che vuole dire la pulizia. Le asciugamani non avevano un bel aspetto né un buon odore, c'era puzza in bagno. C'era polvere nelle superfici. Il bagno non era stato pulito a dovere, la doccia era indecente. Mi dispiace per alcuni del personale, ma il proprietario o booking deve fare un corso di formazione per tenere pulito un albergo del genere.

reviews.originalComment:
Hotel'a di tengah kota 
Bagus 
Baru 
Staff ramah 
Sarapan enak dan banyak pilihan
Kolam renang jg sangat menyenangkan utk anak
reviews.reviewComments:
City center hotel  
Nice  
New  
Friendly staff  
Delicious breakfast with many options  
The pool is also very enjoyable for kids

reviews.reviewPositives: De binnenkomst en het vriendelijke personeel.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Hoe ontzettend goor de badkamer was de douche kwam niet hoger dan onze schouders. Er zaten vlekken, haren sn etensresten in het bed. We hebben 3 keer roomservice moeten bellen om het een beetje schoner te krijgen.
Het inpandig zwembad had groene aanslag op de tegels en er dreef een olielaagje op.
De ontbijtzaal was net zoals onze kamer. Heel vies dus 
We zijn na 1 nacht voortijdig uitgecheckt en naar een ander onderkomen gevlucht.

reviews.originalComment: Dengan harga yang terjangkau mendapatkan fasilitas yang bagus dan sarapan pagi cukup banyak variasinya
reviews.reviewComments: With an affordable price, you get good facilities and a breakfast with quite a variety.

reviews.reviewComments: Although yesterday there was still the sound of something falling from the 4th floor through the stairs.. overall is recommended...👌🏻☺️ Next time if there is another holiday schedule, I want to stay here again...

reviews.originalComment: Untuk lokasi bagus di tengah kota. Sarapan tidak sebanding dengan harga. Checkin juga lama
reviews.reviewComments: Good location in the city center. Breakfast is not worth the price. Check-in is also slow.

reviews.originalComment: Recommend, bersih, rapih, wangi, staff ramah, tp sayang room tidak ada ventilasi sama sekali, meskipun ruangan besar jd terkesan sesak karna tidak ada jendela
reviews.reviewComments: Recommend, clean, neat, fragrant, friendly staff, but unfortunately the room has no ventilation at all, even though the room is large it feels cramped because there are no windows.

Sangat Mengecewakan – Tidak Layak Disebut Hotel Bintang 4

Pengalaman menginap di hotel ini sangat mengecewakan. Informasi di aplikasi tidak sesuai dengan kenyataan. Aturan tidak jelas—tidak memperbolehkan saudara kandung sekamar, hanya istri atau anak kandung yang diperbolehkan. Saat sudah masuk kamar baru ditlp, kenapa tidak ditanya saat check in tadi ?.Ini sangat membingungkan dan tidak pernah dijelaskan sebelumnya. Sehingga terpaksa menambah kamar. Benar² merusak suasana hati dan liburan kami, keluarga yg menyusul akhirnya saya minta untuk ke hotel lain saja. 😡 

Fasilitas gym rusak total dan membahayakan. Kamar sangat kotor: jendela dan cermin penuh debu dan tahi cicak, sprei dan selimut juga ada kotoran cicak. AC tidak ada remote, hanya disuruh pakai double selimut. Kamar mandi bau bangkai dan setelah lapor pun hanya ditambah kamper namun bau tetap sama. Dinding kamar berjamur sampai menyebabkan pusing saat bangun tidur. Water heater juga tidak berfungsi dengan baik—air tidak panas dan tidak stabil.

Toiletries tidak lengkap, alat tulis tidak disediakan, dan kebersihan kamar sangat buruk. Sarapan sangat biasa saja, peralatan makan kotor, gelas ada bercak² kotoran seperti gelas yang sudah sangat lama disimpan, hanya salad yang menurut saya lumayan.

Harga dan fasilitas sangat tidak sebanding. Sama sekali tidak mencerminkan hotel bintang 4—pelayanan dan kualitasnya bahkan tidak lebih baik dari wisma atau penginapan murah.

Saya datang dari jauh untuk beristirahat, tapi justru mendapat pengalaman yang sangat mengecewakan. Sangat tidak direkomendasikan. Lebih baik pilih hotel lain yang benar-benar menghargai kenyamanan tamu.

Ternyata sesuai dengan review bahwa hotel ini buruk sekali

reviews.originalComment: Kolam renang baru bisa d gunakan pukul 11 pagi sementara pukul 12 sudah wkt nya chekout, perlu d perhatikan lagi krn tujuan pengunjung memilih hotel terkadang krn mau berenang, lantai kamar sedikit licin mungkin saat mengepel sabun pel di semprotkan kemudian dipel, sebaiknya sabun di campur air dan dipel menggunakan ember agar lantai tidak terasa lengket dan licin
reviews.reviewComments: The swimming pool can only be used from 11 AM, while checkout is at 12 PM. This needs to be looked into again because visitors often choose hotels to swim. The floor in the room is a bit slippery, perhaps because soap is sprayed and then mopped. It would be better to mix the soap with water and mop using a bucket so that the floor does not feel sticky and slippery.

reviews.originalComment: Pelayanan dan fasilitas perlu ditingkatkan lagi. Checkin lama menunggu lebih dari 1 jam, handuk juga tidak di berikan. Sarapan refillnya terlalu lama. Dan rasa tidak sesuai
reviews.reviewComments: Service and facilities need to be improved. Check-in took a long time, more than 1 hour, towels were also not provided. The breakfast refill took too long, and the taste did not match expectations.

love this place, would surely comeback

reviews.originalComment: Lambat proses  check in. Kamar mantap.dan bersih. Tapi air di toilet kurang lancar. Harga lumayan mahal. Sarapan pagi  enak tLi untuk sarapan anak dibatasi 1 yg kecil saja.
reviews.reviewComments: Slow check-in process. The room is great and clean. But the water in the toilet is not flowing well. The price is quite expensive. Breakfast is good, but the portion for children is limited to only 1 small one.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel dengan lokasi yang strategis
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel with a strategic location

Westafelnya sempet mati airnya, begitupun flush toiletnya. Katanya AC Central sih, tapi gakerasa sama sekali.
Untuk masalah AC gapapa sih, karna gaakan kepanasan juga disana. 
Kalau ada orang diluar kamar ngobrol kedengaran ke kamar, bahkan tetangga samping kamar bersin terdengar wkwkw. apa ini pengaruh AC ga idup yaa? saya kurang ngerti juga sih.
Makanannya enak, okeey. tapi jarang di refill sama petugasnya. 
oke sih untuk harga segitu.

This is my 2nd time staying at this hotel. Facilities are very good, the rooftop restaurant and view is superb. It got minimarket at 2nd floor and swimming pool at ground floor. KFC chains restaurant is there as well if your kids not into local foods.

reviews.originalComment: GBH takengon saya nyaman buat keluarga dan staff nya ramah
reviews.reviewComments: GBH makes me comfortable for my family and the staff are friendly.
Clean room, alright breakfast but lacks hot water (essential in a place with cold weather) and WIFI could not be reached in the room and most of the times unstable

reviews.originalComment: Alhamdulillah, senanggg bisa datang kesini, pas bangettt buat wisatawan lokal maupun asing, dari semuanya good quality servis 😊🥰
reviews.reviewComments: Thank God, I'm so happy to be here, it's just perfect for both local and foreign tourists, everything has good quality service 😊🥰

reviews.originalComment: Kamar bersih, tidak bau, ada kolam renangnya. Saya dapat kamar yg tidak ada jendelanya, AC tidak dilengkapi dengan remot kontrol sehingga suhu ruangan tidak bisa di atur
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean, has no smell, and has a swimming pool. I got a room without windows, and the air conditioning is not equipped with a remote control, so the room temperature cannot be adjusted.

reviews.originalComment: Sangat di rekomendasikan untuk nginap disini, apa lagi bawa anak2. Dekat dgn kota dan fasilitas nya semua lengkap.
reviews.reviewComments: Highly recommended to stay here, especially if you have children. Close to the city and all the facilities are complete.

reviews.reviewTitle: A really great place to stay.

reviews.reviewComments: Highly recommended to stay here, especially if you have children. It's close to the city and all the facilities are complete.

reviews.originalComment: pilihan terbaik untuk hotel di takengon yang punya fasilitas lengkap hanya saja kamar yg sedikit kecil banyak yg tanpa jendela
reviews.reviewComments: The best choice for hotels in Takengon with complete facilities, but the rooms are a bit small and many have no windows.

Big Room.. really big!! King bed and very comfotable. But the breakfast need to improve. Overall the staf, room and facilities is great. If you plan to stay here, pleasee go to the Cafe Kuren just infront hotel. They have really goodd coffee. I will repeat again to Takegon all the way from Malaysia. 🤩

reviews.originalComment: Pelayanan hotel sangat baik, fasilitas lumayan,ada restoran KFC dibawah hotel,udara sangat sejuk disini,anak" sangat senang ditambah lagi ada kolam renang disini....semoga berkesempatan untuk datang lagi 😊😊
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel service is very good, the facilities are decent, there is a KFC restaurant below the hotel, the air is very cool here, the kids are very happy especially with the swimming pool here... I hope to have the opportunity to come back again 😊😊

Unexpectedly is a very good hotel with many facilities, especially good for family. Try relaxing in the rooftop cafe at night! Those who bring kids can rest assured as they have swimming pool and even playground. KFC is located just besides of the hotel, perfect if you or your kids are not into local food. Their breakfast is very generous in the serving. It also has minimarket for your daily necessity.

reviews.originalComment: Terbaik untuk fasilitas, lokasi midah di temukan, salau agak jauh ke lokasi wisata, tp mudah untuk parkir kendaraan
reviews.reviewComments: Best for facilities, the location is easy to find, although a bit far from tourist spots, but easy to park vehicles.
